reasons.repository-integrity: Every development run must prove the repository and relative module graph can be inspected.
reasons.test-coverage: Every completed change needs an executed test result, not only source inspection.
reasons.kit-composition: Kit or domain changes must be exercised through a composed engine path.
reasons.installed-api-parity: Public direct APIs and APIs installed into engine.n must agree.
reasons.snapshot-reset-replay: Stateful domains must prove snapshot, reset, and replay behavior.
reasons.public-export-integrity: Public entrypoints and package exports must resolve after the change.
reasons.browser-startup: Browser-facing work must prove startup and console health in a browser-capable environment.
